title: disa alticola
intro: Disa alticola, also known as the Mountain Disa, is a species of orchid native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The Mountain Disa has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, with its health benefits including anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Disa alticola include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's roots and leaves in hot water or boiling them in a broth.
